error_signature: Wait node does not trigger at specified time
title: Wait node fails to trigger at specified time
symptom: The wait node does not trigger at the expected date and time when using an expression for the date input.
applies_when: Providing a date expression with time
not_this_if: Wait node triggers correctly with other inputs
root_cause: The expression used for the date and time was incorrectly formatted, leading to the wait node not recognizing the intended trigger time. Specifically, the timezone offset was included in the wrong format.
fix_steps: Edit the wait node's date expression
Remove the timezone offset from the expression
agent_instruction: Update the wait node's date expression to remove the timezone offset.
